title: tests-agentic README.md front-matter
description: Schema for the YAML front-matter at the top of every tests-agentic/<bundle>/README.md file.

generated.description: Always true. Marks the bundle as agent-generated; hand-edits are not preserved.

model.description: Identifier of the agent that produced this bundle.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this bundle was produced.

source_commit.description: Git SHA the agent observed when producing the bundle.

watched_paths_digest.description: SHA-256 over (path, size, contents) of every file in the bundle's watched_paths at source_commit.

source_doc.description: Doc the tests in this bundle are anchored to.

source_doc_digest.description: SHA-256 of the source_doc file at source_commit.

warning.description: Banner string telling readers this file is auto-generated and must not be hand-edited.
